name: Sunset Warm Sample
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#ff6b35"/>
  
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="sunsetGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff6b35"/>
          <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#f7931e"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffd93d"/>
        </linearGradient>
        <radialGradient id="sunGradient" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff3b0"/>
          <stop offset="70%" stop-color="#ffd93d"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent"/>
        </radialGradient>
        <linearGradient id="horizonGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffd93d" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f7931e" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      
      <!-- Sunset sky -->
      <rect width="450" height="450" fill="url(#sunsetGradient)"/>
      
      <!-- Sun -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="350" r="80" fill="url(#sunGradient)"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="350" r="50" fill="#fff3b0" opacity="0.9"/>
      
      <!-- Sun rays -->
      <line x1="280" y1="350" x2="325" y2="350" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="272.6313972081441" y1="377.5" x2="311.6025403784439" y2="400" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="252.5" y1="397.6313972081441" x2="275" y2="436.60254037844385" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="225" y1="405" x2="225" y2="450" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="197.5" y1="397.6313972081441" x2="175.00000000000003" y2="436.6025403784439" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="177.36860279185586" y1="377.5" x2="138.39745962155612" y2="400" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="170" y1="350" x2="125" y2="350" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="177.3686027918559" y1="322.5" x2="138.39745962155615" y2="300" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="197.49999999999997" y1="302.3686027918559" x2="174.99999999999994" y2="263.39745962155615" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="225" y1="295" x2="224.99999999999997" y2="250" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="252.5" y1="302.3686027918559" x2="275" y2="263.39745962155615" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      <line x1="272.6313972081441" y1="322.5" x2="311.60254037844385" y2="299.99999999999994" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
      
      <!-- Horizon line -->
      <rect x="0" y="380" width="450" height="70" fill="url(#horizonGradient)" opacity="0.5"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="385" x2="450" y2="385" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
      
      <!-- Clouds -->
      <g opacity="0.4">
        <ellipse cx="100" cy="80" rx="60" ry="25" fill="#fff3b0"/>
        <ellipse cx="140" cy="75" rx="40" ry="20" fill="#fff3b0"/>
        <ellipse cx="350" cy="120" rx="50" ry="22" fill="#fff3b0"/>
        <ellipse cx="320" cy="115" rx="35" ry="18" fill="#fff3b0"/>
      </g>
      
      <!-- Clock face (semi-transparent) -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="180" r="120" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="180" r="110" fill="none" stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
      
      <!-- Hour markers -->
      <line x1="225" y1="75" x2="225" y2="85" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="1"/>
      <line x1="277.5" y1="89.06733260263395" x2="272.5" y2="97.72758664047834" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="315.93266739736606" y1="127.5" x2="307.2724133595217" y2="132.5" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="330" y1="180" x2="320" y2="180" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="1"/>
      <line x1="315.93266739736606" y1="232.5" x2="307.2724133595217" y2="227.5" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="277.5" y1="270.93266739736606" x2="272.5" y2="262.2724133595217" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="225" y1="285" x2="225" y2="275" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="1"/>
      <line x1="172.50000000000003" y1="270.93266739736606" x2="177.50000000000003" y2="262.2724133595217" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="134.06733260263394" y1="232.5" x2="142.7275866404783" y2="227.5" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="180" x2="130" y2="180" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="1"/>
      <line x1="134.06733260263394" y1="127.49999999999999" x2="142.72758664047834" y2="132.5" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="172.49999999999994" y1="89.06733260263395" x2="177.49999999999994" y2="97.72758664047835" 
                       stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
                       opacity="0.6"/>
      
      <!-- Clock hands (centered at 180) -->
      <g>
        
            <line cx="225" cy="180" x1="225" y1="180" 
                  x2="264.1304078426207" 
                  y2="148.87426816811902" 
                  stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <line cx="225" cy="180" x1="225" y1="180" 
                  x2="155.80542792339216" 
                  y2="190.5882574173054" 
                  stroke="#fff3b0" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <line cx="225" cy="180" x1="225" y1="180" 
                  x2="198.73355547812946" 
                  y2="260.83980388508803" 
                  stroke="#ff4500" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <circle cx="225" cy="180" r="6" fill="#ff4500"/>
          
      </g>
    
</svg>
